### Step 1: Recall the momentum formula
Momentum \( p \) of an object is calculated as \( p = m \times v \), where \( m \) is mass and \( v \) is velocity.

### Step 2: Plug in the given values
Here, \( m = 0.15 \, \text{kg} \) and \( v = 40 \, \text{m/s} \). Calculate the product:
\( p = 0.15 \times 40 = 6.0 \, \text{kg·m/s} \)

C
D
